code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> Draft: Create feature
    
    Draft --> Active: Validate & Deploy
    Draft --> [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]: Discard
    
    Active --> Deprecated: Mark as deprecated
    Active --> Active: Update version
    
    Deprecated --> Archived: After transition period
    Deprecated --> Active: Reactivate
    
    Archived --> [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]: Delete metadata
    
    note right of Draft
        Status: DRAFT
        - Feature in development
        - Not used in production
        - Can be modified freely
    end note
    
    note right of Active
        Status: ACTIVE
        - Feature in production use
        - Immutable (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)
        - Monitored and maintained
    end note
    
    note right of Deprecated
        Status: DEPRECATED
        - Still available but discouraged
        - Documentation shows replacement
        - Transition period (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)
    end note
    
    note right of Archived
        Status: ARCHIVED
        - No longer available
        - Metadata kept for historical reference
        - Can be purged after retention period
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine设计一个功能生命周期状态机，核心状态包括Draft、Active、Deprecated和Archived四个阶段，每个状态要有明确的转换规则和业务说明。
明白。我理解为：从DiagnosticEngine创建功能时进入Draft，验证部署后到Active。那废弃功能是直接删除还是另有处理？另外Draft状态如果不需要了怎么处理？
废弃不会直接删除，而是先标记为Deprecated，经过transition period后再进入Archived。Draft如果废弃则直接存入HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。Archived状态最终可以删除metadata，但保留历史记录。

好的，我梳理一下转换关系：Draft到Active需要Validate & Deploy；Draft可以Discard到Vault；Active可以Update version保持自身循环，也可以Mark as deprecated到Deprecated；Deprecated可以Reactivate回Active，或者经过transition period到Archived；Archived最终Delete metadata回到DiagnosticEngine。这样对吗？
转换关系正确。另外每个状态需要详细的note说明：Draft是开发中、可自由修改；Active是生产使用、Immutable；Deprecated仍可用但不推荐；Archived不可用但保留metadata。

已绘制完成。Draft的note包含"Feature in development"、"Not used in production"、"Can be modified freely"；Active强调"Immutable"和"Monitored and maintained"；Deprecated说明"Still available but discouraged"和"Documentation shows replacement"；Archived标注"Metadata kept for historical reference"。
Active的note里"Immutable"需要特别注明是由HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine保证的，另外Deprecated的transition period也要关联到HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault的合规要求。
已修正。Active的note现在写"Immutable (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)"，Deprecated的note加入"Transition period (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)"。Archived的purge逻辑也补充了"after retention period"。
完美。这个状态机涵盖了功能从创建到最终清理的完整生命周期，HIPAA合规和数据保留策略都体现到位了。
